reasoning: The chart fails to answer the specific business question for two main reasons: 1) The title claims 'Annual Revenues' ('Jahresumsätze'), but the x-axis displays individual months, showing monthly data points rather than aggregated yearly totals. A user looking for annual performance would be confused by this mismatch. 2) The configuration only includes data up to December 2022 (indices 0-23), completely omitting the years 2023 and 2024 which are explicitly requested in the prompt ('2021 bis 2024'). Consequently, it provides an incomplete picture of the required timeframe.
suggested_improvement: Aggregate the data by year to show four bars (one for each year 2021-2024) representing the total sum of revenue per year, or extend the current monthly view to include all months through December 2024 and rename the title to reflect monthly trends.
